hooks.command: bash -c 'FP=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if echo "$FP" | grep -qE "\.(pbxproj|xcworkspace|xib|storyboard)$|xcodeproj/|xcworkspace/"; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not modify Xcode project files directly. Create Swift files and add them to Xcode manually." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FP=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if echo "$FP" | grep -qE "\.entitlements$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not modify .entitlements files without explicit user permission." >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'FP=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if echo "$FP" | grep -qE "\.swift$"; then swiftformat "$FP" --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi'
bash -c 'FP=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if echo "$FP" | grep -qE "\.swift$"; then swiftlint lint --path "$FP" --quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
